creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204006
patch to update the port

- update 2.060 -> 2.066
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/IO-Socket-SSL
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.3.2 runs ok at 12.0-RELEASE-p3-amd64,
	pkg 1.10.5, perl5-5.28.2 and with:
		1) ssl=openssl111
		2) ssl=openssl
		3) ssl=libressl
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail in all cases say: "PASS".
